newsSinceJun6: No material fundamental news since June 6. Freshest items are administrative: a June 5 second amended $500M revolving credit agreement (option to upsize by $250M, matures 2031), a June 1 FY2025 sustainability report, and a small June 3 CEO sale of 1,000 shares at $290. Strong Q2 FY26 results (19% YoY revenue growth, record program wins, raised FY26 guidance to mid-teens growth) are older and already reflected. Today's -0.99% is noise; median analyst target ~$277.50 sits at/below the $279.49 price after the 83.6% YTD run.

sources.label: Investing.com - Plexus enters new $500M credit agreement maturing 2031 (June 5, 2026)
Investing.com - Plexus CEO sells $290,000 in common stock (June 3, 2026)
Plexus Q2 FY2026 earnings release (8-K, SEC)
Public.com - PLXS analyst consensus and price targets

verdicts.rankRationale: Hold at rank 17 with mild drift down in score: no new fundamental evidence since June 6 (only an administrative credit refinancing and a tiny CEO sale), while the 83.6% YTD rerating keeps eroding residual alpha on this crowding-sensitive list; price now sits above the ~$277.50 median analyst target. Yesterday's hold already reflected this setup and today's -0.99% changes nothing.
verdicts.bull: Raised FY26 guidance to mid-teens growth on record program wins gives fundamental cover for the rerating, and the new $500M revolver (plus $250M accordion) adds capacity to fund ramps; an underfollowed $7.4B EMS proxy on complex cloud/network gear can keep compounding wins.
verdicts.neutral: Thesis intact but fully discovered at the margin: strong Q2 momentum is offset by a price already at/above sell-side targets, leaving the name fairly valued for an alpha list until the next wins/guidance datapoint.
verdicts.bear: After an 83.6% YTD run, any AI-hardware order digestion or program-ramp slippage hits a stock priced for continuation; EMS margins are thin and the name is increasingly owned as an AI-adjacent proxy, so crowding unwind risk has risen.
verdicts.primaryCatalyst: Fiscal Q3 (July) earnings and the next quarterly program-wins tally; continued record wins or another guidance raise would refresh the case.
verdicts.primaryRisk: Post-rerating multiple compression if program ramps slow or AI networking/cloud customers digest orders, with price already above the median analyst target.
